title: Korean-Style Fried Banana Fritters
description: Crispy and sweet banana fritters with a hint of Korean spice.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, cornstarch, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, mash the bananas and mix with crushed corn flakes.
Add the gochujang sauce to the banana mixture and stir until combined.
Add the dry ingredients to the banana mixture and stir until just combined.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the banana mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
